body.en: Stop at red signals. Give way at crossings according to the rules.
body.local: Stop at red signals. Give way at crossings according to the rules.

body.en: Triangles warn. Circles commonly indicate restrictions or mandatory actions.
body.local: Triangles warn. Circles commonly indicate restrictions or mandatory actions.

body.en: Wear seatbelts and keep a safe following distance.
body.local: Wear seatbelts and keep a safe following distance.

body.en: Check mirrors and blind spots, then signal before moving into another lane.
body.local: Check mirrors and blind spots, then signal before moving into another lane.
